It is time for a bonus video. So, now that you have published your ads, you might be wondering what you can do to optimize them and what are some benchmarks like what is a good cost per result. So, here at Gym Launch, we consider anything below $20 to be a good cost per result. You're going to want to talk to your coach to figure out what number is good for your specific market. But I want to show you how to set up a rule that's going to help manage your cost per result on a weekly basis. So, go to your ads manager and go ahead and go to automated rules. Please keep in mind that even though we're setting up an automated rule, that you should still be actively working with and checking your ads on a daily basis. This rule should honestly never apply because you should have already turned your ad set off and created a new one before this could happen. But just in case, and so we have some insurance, you're going to go ahead and click on create rule. And then we're going to apply our rule to all active ad sets and our action is going to be turn off ad sets if the cost per result is greater than. Here you'll place whatever number you and your coach have decided on. So, what works for your market? So, I'm going to put in $10 because that typically works for the market that I am in. And I'm going to click add. And then I'm going to fill out our lifetime impressions and make sure that those are greater than 5,000. So, that we are in a place where our ad has had the time, because that's important, to actually locate a good demographic. And then the time range is going to be within the last seven days. So, that's going to take care of ads that might have been performing really well to start, but are now starting to sizzle out. And then that's our rule. So, all we're telling Facebook is if I have an ad that goes above a $10 cost per result, and this number might be different for your market, within the last seven days that has had time to actually find its audience, then it's a loser. So, I want you to turn it off. At the bottom, you'll go ahead and name the rule whatever you want to name it that makes the most sense for you. I am going to name mine if C-P-R is over $10. Kill the losing ad. And I'm going to go ahead and hit create. So, I hope that this bonus video helps you out and that you have a great day.
